mapper.select: SELECT database_id, instance_id, MAX(collected_at) as collected_at, AVG(avg_elapsed_seconds) as avg_elapsed_seconds, SUM(total_dead_tuples) as total_dead_tuples, AVG(worker_utilization_pct) as worker_utilization_pct, AVG(avg_cost_delay_ms) as avg_cost_delay_ms, SUM(active_vacuum_sessions) as active_vacuum_sessions FROM vacuum_metrics_agg_5m WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} AND instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY database_id, instance_id

SELECT database_id, instance_id, collected_at, total_vacuum_sessions, active_vacuum_sessions, autovacuum_sessions, manual_vacuum_sessions, avg_dead_tuples, max_dead_tuples, total_dead_tuples, dead_tuple_increase_rate, dead_tuple_decrease_rate, net_dead_tuple_change, avg_progress, tables_with_dead_tuples, tables_being_vacuumed, avg_elapsed_seconds, max_elapsed_seconds, avg_cost_delay_ms, worker_utilization_pct, max_workers_configured, created_at FROM vacuum_metrics_agg_5m WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} AND instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} ORDER BY collected_at ASC

SELECT #{databaseId} AS database_id, #{instanceId} AS instance_id, AVG(total_bloat_bytes) AS total_bloat_bytes, AVG(avg_bloat_ratio) AS avg_bloat_ratio, SUM(critical_bloat_tables) AS critical_bloat_tables, AVG(total_table_size_bytes) AS total_table_size_bytes FROM vacuum_metrics_agg_5m WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} AND instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vacuum_metrics_agg_5m ( database_id, instance_id, collected_at, total_vacuum_sessions, active_vacuum_sessions, autovacuum_sessions, manual_vacuum_sessions, avg_dead_tuples, max_dead_tuples, total_dead_tuples, avg_progress, tables_with_dead_tuples, tables_being_vacuumed, avg_elapsed_seconds, max_elapsed_seconds, dead_tuple_increase_rate, dead_tuple_decrease_rate, net_dead_tuple_change, avg_cost_delay_ms, worker_utilization_pct, max_workers_configured, avg_bloat_bytes, max_bloat_bytes, total_bloat_bytes, avg_bloat_ratio, max_bloat_ratio, critical_bloat_tables, total_table_size_bytes, blocked_vacuum_count, avg_blocked_seconds, max_blocked_seconds, top_table_1, top_table_1_dead_tuples, top_table_2, top_table_2_dead_tuples, top_table_3, top_table_3_dead_tuples, top_table_4, top_table_4_dead_tuples, top_table_5, top_table_5_dead_tuples, top_bloat_table_1, top_bloat_table_1_bytes, top_bloat_table_2, top_bloat_table_2_bytes, top_bloat_table_3, top_bloat_table_3_bytes, top_bloat_table_4, top_bloat_table_4_bytes, top_bloat_table_5, top_bloat_table_5_bytes, top_blocker_table_1, top_blocker_table_1_seconds, top_blocker_table_2, top_blocker_table_2_seconds, top_blocker_table_3, top_blocker_table_3_seconds, created_at ) VALUES ( #{databaseId}, #{instanceId}, #{collectedAt}, #{totalVacuumSessions}, #{activeVacuumSessions}, #{autovacuumSessions}, #{manualVacuumSessions}, #{avgDeadTuples}, #{maxDeadTuples}, #{totalDeadTuples}, #{avgProgress}, #{tablesWithDeadTuples}, #{tablesBeingVacuumed}, #{avgElapsedSeconds}, #{maxElapsedSeconds}, #{deadTupleIncreaseRate}, #{deadTupleDecreaseRate}, #{netDeadTupleChange}, #{avgCostDelayMs}, #{workerUtilizationPct}, #{maxWorkersConfigured}, #{avgBloatBytes}, #{maxBloatBytes}, #{totalBloatBytes}, #{avgBloatRatio}, #{maxBloatRatio}, #{criticalBloatTables}, #{totalTableSizeBytes}, #{blockedVacuumCount}, #{avgBlockedSeconds}, #{maxBlockedSeconds}, #{topTable1}, #{topTable1DeadTuples}, #{topTable2}, #{topTable2DeadTuples}, #{topTable3}, #{topTable3DeadTuples}, #{topTable4}, #{topTable4DeadTuples}, #{topTable5}, #{topTable5DeadTuples}, #{topBloatTable1}, #{topBloatTable1Bytes}, #{topBloatTable2}, #{topBloatTable2Bytes}, #{topBloatTable3}, #{topBloatTable3Bytes}, #{topBloatTable4}, #{topBloatTable4Bytes}, #{topBloatTable5}, #{topBloatTable5Bytes}, #{topBlockerTable1}, #{topBlockerTable1Seconds}, #{topBlockerTable2}, #{topBlockerTable2Seconds}, #{topBlockerTable3}, #{topBlockerTable3Seconds}, #{createdAt} ) ON CONFLICT (database_id, instance_id, collected_at) DO UPDATE SET total_vacuum_sessions = EXCLUDED.total_vacuum_sessions, active_vacuum_sessions = EXCLUDED.active_vacuum_sessions, autovacuum_sessions = EXCLUDED.autovacuum_sessions, manual_vacuum_sessions = EXCLUDED.manual_vacuum_sessions, avg_dead_tuples = EXCLUDED.avg_dead_tuples, max_dead_tuples = EXCLUDED.max_dead_tuples, total_dead_tuples = EXCLUDED.total_dead_tuples, avg_progress = EXCLUDED.avg_progress, tables_with_dead_tuples = EXCLUDED.tables_with_dead_tuples, tables_being_vacuumed = EXCLUDED.tables_being_vacuumed, avg_elapsed_seconds = EXCLUDED.avg_elapsed_seconds, max_elapsed_seconds = EXCLUDED.max_elapsed_seconds, dead_tuple_increase_rate = EXCLUDED.dead_tuple_increase_rate, dead_tuple_decrease_rate = EXCLUDED.dead_tuple_decrease_rate, net_dead_tuple_change = EXCLUDED.net_dead_tuple_change, avg_cost_delay_ms = EXCLUDED.avg_cost_delay_ms, worker_utilization_pct = EXCLUDED.worker_utilization_pct, max_workers_configured = EXCLUDED.max_workers_configured, avg_bloat_bytes = EXCLUDED.avg_bloat_bytes, max_bloat_bytes = EXCLUDED.max_bloat_bytes, total_bloat_bytes = EXCLUDED.total_bloat_bytes, avg_bloat_ratio = EXCLUDED.avg_bloat_ratio, max_bloat_ratio = EXCLUDED.max_bloat_ratio, critical_bloat_tables = EXCLUDED.critical_bloat_tables, total_table_size_bytes = EXCLUDED.total_table_size_bytes, blocked_vacuum_count = EXCLUDED.blocked_vacuum_count, avg_blocked_seconds = EXCLUDED.avg_blocked_seconds, max_blocked_seconds = EXCLUDED.max_blocked_seconds, top_table_1 = EXCLUDED.top_table_1, top_table_1_dead_tuples = EXCLUDED.top_table_1_dead_tuples, top_table_2 = EXCLUDED.top_table_2, top_table_2_dead_tuples = EXCLUDED.top_table_2_dead_tuples, top_table_3 = EXCLUDED.top_table_3, top_table_3_dead_tuples = EXCLUDED.top_table_3_dead_tuples, top_table_4 = EXCLUDED.top_table_4, top_table_4_dead_tuples = EXCLUDED.top_table_4_dead_tuples, top_table_5 = EXCLUDED.top_table_5, top_table_5_dead_tuples = EXCLUDED.top_table_5_dead_tuples, top_bloat_table_1 = EXCLUDED.top_bloat_table_1, top_bloat_table_1_bytes = EXCLUDED.top_bloat_table_1_bytes, top_bloat_table_2 = EXCLUDED.top_bloat_table_2, top_bloat_table_2_bytes = EXCLUDED.top_bloat_table_2_bytes, top_bloat_table_3 = EXCLUDED.top_bloat_table_3, top_bloat_table_3_bytes = EXCLUDED.top_bloat_table_3_bytes, top_bloat_table_4 = EXCLUDED.top_bloat_table_4, top_bloat_table_4_bytes = EXCLUDED.top_bloat_table_4_bytes, top_bloat_table_5 = EXCLUDED.top_bloat_table_5, top_bloat_table_5_bytes = EXCLUDED.top_bloat_table_5_bytes, top_blocker_table_1 = EXCLUDED.top_blocker_table_1, top_blocker_table_1_seconds = EXCLUDED.top_blocker_table_1_seconds, top_blocker_table_2 = EXCLUDED.top_blocker_table_2, top_blocker_table_2_seconds = EXCLUDED.top_blocker_table_2_seconds, top_blocker_table_3 = EXCLUDED.top_blocker_table_3, top_blocker_table_3_seconds = EXCLUDED.top_blocker_table_3_seconds, created_at = EXCLUDED.created_at

INSERT INTO vacuum_metrics_agg_5m ( database_id, instance_id, collected_at, total_vacuum_sessions, active_vacuum_sessions, autovacuum_sessions, manual_vacuum_sessions, avg_dead_tuples, max_dead_tuples, total_dead_tuples, avg_progress, tables_with_dead_tuples, tables_being_vacuumed, avg_elapsed_seconds, max_elapsed_seconds, dead_tuple_increase_rate, dead_tuple_decrease_rate, net_dead_tuple_change, avg_cost_delay_ms, worker_utilization_pct, max_workers_configured, avg_bloat_bytes, max_bloat_bytes, total_bloat_bytes, avg_bloat_ratio, max_bloat_ratio, critical_bloat_tables, total_table_size_bytes, blocked_vacuum_count, avg_blocked_seconds, max_blocked_seconds, top_table_1, top_table_1_dead_tuples, top_table_2, top_table_2_dead_tuples, top_table_3, top_table_3_dead_tuples, top_table_4, top_table_4_dead_tuples, top_table_5, top_table_5_dead_tuples, top_bloat_table_1, top_bloat_table_1_bytes, top_bloat_table_2, top_bloat_table_2_bytes, top_bloat_table_3, top_bloat_table_3_bytes, top_bloat_table_4, top_bloat_table_4_bytes, top_bloat_table_5, top_bloat_table_5_bytes, top_blocker_table_1, top_blocker_table_1_seconds, top_blocker_table_2, top_blocker_table_2_seconds, top_blocker_table_3, top_blocker_table_3_seconds, created_at ) VALUES
( #{item.databaseId}, #{item.instanceId}, #{item.collectedAt}, #{item.totalVacuumSessions}, #{item.activeVacuumSessions}, #{item.autovacuumSessions}, #{item.manualVacuumSessions}, #{item.avgDeadTuples}, #{item.maxDeadTuples}, #{item.totalDeadTuples}, #{item.avgProgress}, #{item.tablesWithDeadTuples}, #{item.tablesBeingVacuumed}, #{item.avgElapsedSeconds}, #{item.maxElapsedSeconds}, #{item.deadTupleIncreaseRate}, #{item.deadTupleDecreaseRate}, #{item.netDeadTupleChange}, #{item.avgCostDelayMs}, #{item.workerUtilizationPct}, #{item.maxWorkersConfigured}, #{item.avgBloatBytes}, #{item.maxBloatBytes}, #{item.totalBloatBytes}, #{item.avgBloatRatio}, #{item.maxBloatRatio}, #{item.criticalBloatTables}, #{item.totalTableSizeBytes}, #{item.blockedVacuumCount}, #{item.avgBlockedSeconds}, #{item.maxBlockedSeconds}, #{item.topTable1}, #{item.topTable1DeadTuples}, #{item.topTable2}, #{item.topTable2DeadTuples}, #{item.topTable3}, #{item.topTable3DeadTuples}, #{item.topTable4}, #{item.topTable4DeadTuples}, #{item.topTable5}, #{item.topTable5DeadTuples}, #{item.topBloatTable1}, #{item.topBloatTable1Bytes}, #{item.topBloatTable2}, #{item.topBloatTable2Bytes}, #{item.topBloatTable3}, #{item.topBloatTable3Bytes}, #{item.topBloatTable4}, #{item.topBloatTable4Bytes}, #{item.topBloatTable5}, #{item.topBloatTable5Bytes}, #{item.topBlockerTable1}, #{item.topBlockerTable1Seconds}, #{item.topBlockerTable2}, #{item.topBlockerTable2Seconds}, #{item.topBlockerTable3}, #{item.topBlockerTable3Seconds}, #{item.createdAt} )
ON CONFLICT (database_id, instance_id, collected_at) DO NOTHING
